title: OAV Entrance Exam Class 6 Merit List 2026 - Class VI Admission (Declared)

detail.title: OAV Entrance Exam Class 6 Merit List 2026 - Class VI Admission (Declared)
detail.short_info: OAV Entrance Exam Class 6 Merit List 2026 released. Check Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya selection list, download merit list PDF, and get direct link with latest updates here.

sections.heading: OAV Entrance Exam Class 6 Merit List 2026 - Class VI Admission (Declared)

content.text: Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya Sangathan has officially declared the OAV Entrance Exam Class 6 Merit List 2026 on March 22, 2026. Students who appeared for the Class VI Admission entrance examination can now check their merit list status online at the official Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya Sangathan website.

Candidates can access their result by visiting sundargarh.odisha.gov.in and entering their registration number and date of birth. It is advisable to download and save the result for future academic and official reference.

sections.heading: OAV Entrance Exam Class 6 Merit List 2026 - Key Highlights

content.text: Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya Sangathan has published the OAV Entrance Exam Class 6 Merit List 2026 on its official website for Class VI Admission. Students can log in using their registration credentials and check their merit list status for the 2026 academic session.

sections.heading: OAV Entrance Exam Class 6 Merit List 2026 - Direct Link

content.text: The official portal has activated the direct link for checking OAV Entrance Exam Class 6 Merit List 2026. Students can instantly view or download their merit list through the official portal using the link provided below.

rows: OAV Entrance Exam Class 6 Merit List 2026

sections.heading: How to Check OAV Entrance Exam Class 6 Merit List 2026 Online?

content.text: Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya Sangathan has made the merit list check process simple and quick for students. Candidates only need their registration number and date of birth to view their merit list status on the official portal. Here is a step-by-step process you can follow:

items: Visit the Official Website - Go to the official Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya Sangathan portal at sundargarh.odisha.gov.in.
Navigate to Results - Click on the Results or Examination tab on the homepage.
Select OAV Entrance Exam - Choose OAV Entrance Exam from the list of available results.
Enter Your Details - Input your Registration Number and Date of Birth in the required fields.
Submit and View - Click the Submit button to view your OAV Entrance Exam Class 6 Merit List 2026 on screen.
Download the Merit List - Click Download or Print to save your merit list PDF for official use.
Verify Your Information - Check that your name, registration number, and admission status are correctly displayed.
